sources_read.current_guideline: 2025 EULAR recommendations for the management of rheumatoid arthritis with synthetic and biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs
sources_read.difficult_to_treat_guidance: EULAR points to consider for the management of difficult-to-treat rheumatoid arthritis
sources_read.us_guideline_context: American College of Rheumatology rheumatoid arthritis guideline page
sources_read.comparative_randomized_trial: non-TNF-targeted biologic versus a second TNF inhibitor after first TNF inhibitor failure (PMID: 27654603)
sources_read.evidence_synthesis: Bayesian network meta-analysis of cycling versus switching targeted therapy (PMID: 33854570)

mechanism: determine whether current external evidence supplies an individualizable treatment or a valid public cohort for a new local experiment

evidence.supported_sequence_level_finding: after first TNF-inhibitor failure in studied active-RA populations, changing to a different mechanism has comparative support over automatically cycling to another TNF inhibitor
evidence.required_first_fork: confirm active inflammatory disease and exclude alternative contributors before DMARD escalation

case_level_gaps: full DMARD exposure-response and discontinuation history
infection, malignancy, cardiovascular and thrombotic safety screen
clinical_status: research evidence summary only; clinician-led assessment required
